title: Model card for accepted model #2
context: Following the pilot model card (pilot-009) and the first triage pass (triage-012), this task authors the full model card for the second gate-passed model. It targets acceptance by the model's host and extends the project toward the M1 goal of at least 2 accepted cards cumulatively. Depends on pilot-009 and triage-012.
objective: Produce a complete, source-verified model card for the second gate-passed open cancer ML model and get it accepted by the model's host, with the acceptance evidence artifact recorded.
acceptanceCriteria: Model selected from triage-012 PASS artifacts with a documented acceptance path (informal channel or Zenodo fallback).
Model and every dataset confirmed gate-003 PASS (committed artifact exists); controlled-access/identifiable data absent.

Complete card produced using the canonical schema (schema-001): intended use, out-of-scope use, data provenance, headline and subgroup metrics (reported or gap-flagged per bias-005), limitations, clinical-validation status, regulatory status, and the not-medical-advice disclaimer; every claim cited in citations[].
Card validated by the schema validator (validator-006) and approved by the Data-License+Privacy reviewer and the ML/technical reviewer.
Completeness score before/after recorded; after score >= 90/100.
Card accepted by the model host (informal channel or Zenodo) with the Steward's outcomes/<model-id>.json acceptance artifact recorded — or submitted with the blocker surfaced.
resources: PLAN.md — Pipeline (per model), Definition of Shipped
output: A complete model card for accepted model #2, committed to the project repo, submitted to the model host, and accompanied by the Steward's outcomes/<model-id>.json acceptance artifact.
